Uses of Class
com.irurueta.ar.calibration.DualImageOfAbsoluteConic

  • Packages that use DualImageOfAbsoluteConic 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.ar.calibration
    This package contains classes used for camera calibration on 3D reconstruction
    com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators
    This package contains classes needed to estimate structures needed for camera calibration

    • Uses of DualImageOfAbsoluteConic in com.irurueta.ar.calibration

      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.calibration that return DualImageOfAbsoluteConic 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      DualImageOfAbsoluteConic DualAbsoluteQuadric.getDualImageOfAbsoluteConic()
      Gets dual image of absolute conic associated to this dual absolute quadric in an arbitrary projective stratum.
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.calibration with parameters of type DualImageOfAbsoluteConic 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void DualAbsoluteQuadric.getDualImageOfAbsoluteConic​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic result)
      Gets dual iamge of absolute conic associated to this dual absolute quadric in an arbitrary projective stratum and stores the result into provided instance.
      void DualAbsoluteQuadric.setDualImageOfAbsoluteConic​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic diac)
      Sets dual image of absolute conic while keeping current plane at infinity in an arbitrary projective stratum.
      void DualAbsoluteQuadric.setDualImageOfAbsoluteConicAndPlaneAtInfinity​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic diac, com.irurueta.geometry.Plane planeAtInfinity)
      Sets this dual absolute quadric from provided dual image of absolute conic and plane at infinity on an arbitrary projective stratum.
      Constructors in com.irurueta.ar.calibration with parameters of type DualImageOfAbsoluteConic 
      Constructor Description
      DualAbsoluteQuadric​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic diac)
      Constructor using provided dual image of absolute conic on an arbitrary affine stratum while keeping the plane at infinity typically used in a metric stratum (0,0,0,1).
      DualAbsoluteQuadric​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic diac, com.irurueta.geometry.Plane planeAtInfinity)
      Constructor from provided dual image of absolute conic and plane at infinity on an arbitrary projective stratum.

      DualImageOfAbsoluteConic KruppaDualImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates Dual Image of Absolute Conic (DIAC).
      Methods in com.irurueta.ar.calibration.estimators with parameters of type DualImageOfAbsoluteConic 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private boolean KruppaDualImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimator.buildDiac​(double horizontalFocalLength, double verticalFocalLength, DualImageOfAbsoluteConic result)
      Builds a DIAC from estimated focal length components and current principal point assuming zero skewness.
      void KruppaDualImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimator.estimate​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic result)
      Estimates Dual Image of Absolute Conic (DIAC).
      private void KruppaDualImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimator.estimateKnownAspectRatio​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic result)
      Estimates the DIAC assuming known aspect ratio.
      private void KruppaDualImageOfAbsoluteConicEstimator.estimateUnknownAspectRatio​(DualImageOfAbsoluteConic result)
      Estimates the DIAC assuming unknown aspect ratio.
